---
name: code-assistant
version: 1.0.0
description: |
  General-purpose coding assistant. Writes, edits, and reviews code. Fixes bugs,
  explains code, adds tests, refactors, and handles any coding task. Runs commands,
  reads files, and makes changes. Use for any coding request: "write this function",
  "fix this bug", "add tests", "refactor this", "explain this code", "review my code".
  Proactively suggest for any programming task the user describes.
allowed-tools:
  - Bash
  - Read
  - Write
  - Edit
  - Grep
  - Glob
---

# code-assistant

General-purpose coding assistant covering all tasks.
